notes: Offset 0 is packed coord via 0x80 - byte transform.
Offset 1..2 is item id, byte-swapped before semantic use, matching ushort.
Offset 0 is packed coord byte used directly for local tile coordinates.
Offsets 1..2, 3..4, and 5..6 are byte-swapped before semantic use, matching ushort item/count fields.

helperSemanticHints.proofRule: Use raw read order as packet order, then map the last FUN_1403526d0 short argument to count and the first helper short argument to id based on the verified OBJ_REVEAL sibling.

notes: Reviewed against decompiled FUN_14013f820 and sibling helper usage in OBJ_REVEAL.
Raw read order is short, byte, short, which preserves packet order as count, packedCoord, id.
FUN_1403526d0 receives helper arguments in semantic order id then count for the ground-item family.
The last helper short argument is count, and the first helper short argument is id.
